string.text: Those who have trampled on the Zone for a long time, as far as I know, are interested in something other than bubble, booze and wish-seeker. Maybe I'm wrong, but in my opinion I heard in the bar that among you went the fashion for philosophical sayings. Will you tell us some interesting parable?
Thank you.
Thanks.

Well, as you say, there is such a trend among the experienced walkers. Then we'll sit down on one or the other. Listen. It is said that one day King Mahmud overtook his retinue. Rushing on his horse at full speed, along the river, he suddenly saw at the water's edge a little boy who was fishing with a seine. The child seemed very unhappy. The king sharply besieged the horse, and, approaching the boy, asked him: "My child, why are you looking so sad?" I've never met a man more sad than you. The boy replied: Your Majesty, there are seven of us brothers. Our father died, and we live with our mother in extreme need. To somehow feed, I come every day to the river and throw the net. If for a day I can not catch a single fish, I stay hungry for the night. My son, "said the king," if you do not mind, I will help you. " The boy agreed, and King Mahmud himself threw the net, which from the touch of the king's hand returned with a rich catch.

Heh, when it's already one year balancing between life and death, then any fool will sooner or later become a philosopher. So listen. A peasant came out to sow wheat in the field. The day draws to a close, and he does not manage to finish his work ... He begged: "Oh, Lord, I would have an assistant, we would have settled two times with the sowing ..." Look, and from the bushes the bear climbs and says to him: "Come on, man, I'll help you, all together are more cheerful." The man was delighted and agreed. They sowed the field on time and, parting in parting, parted ... It's time for harvest ... The peasant does not have time to harvest the harvest by the time ... Look, and from the bushes the familiar bear climbs out and says: "Come on, man, I'll help you, the two of us are more handy." And the work began to boil ... They gathered a harvest, yes, such as the peasant never saw before. So he says to the bear: "Come on, Misha, to my house. You helped me to sow and to reap ... Let's go, we'll sit at the table: we'll have a drink, we'll eat, we'll talk ..." The bear agreed, pleased with his generosity of the peasant. They sit at the table, rejoice, and the bear keeps saying: Look, man, if it were not for me, you would not have sown the whole field ... If it was not for me, you would not have harvested such a crop ... A guy and thought: "Vaughan he is healthy and strong, he will take everything from me and break my bones ... No wonder he himself praises so ..." The man of a pitch-fork suffices, and sticks them into a bear. The bear was sick with pain ... and fled into the forest. The time has passed ... and it's time to sow ... The peasant left the field to sow, but without an assistant only half the field sowed. It's time for harvest, but only half of the harvest was collected by the peasant ... He goes home dull ... Look, and from the bushes the bear climbs. A peasant and says with reproach: "What are you, Misha, did not come to help me sow and reap? ... I did, and I fed you, and you?" To which the bear, pointing to the chest, answers: "But here I have a pain ..." A peasant approaches a bear, probes, and says: "Why, it's all healed, Misha!" A bear in return: "The wound has healed ... SOUL IS SICK !!!"

Well - not so much we are more than cool philosophers. Just lovers to read something that really has a price. So I'm telling you. One unknown king came to an unknown poet and said: "O King, unparalleled in the heavens!" I composed a hymn in your honor, and my creation is brighter than all the poems that so far other poets have written to you, like Sirius, the brightest of all the stars in the night sky. With these words he handed the king a sheet on which was written only the name of this ruler. The king looked at the sheet and became angry: "Where are the verses?" He cried. "Are you crazy?" You did not sing our royal glory, did not sing our victories and good deeds. You did not even say that I created this whole kingdom with my own hands! Do you dare to joke at me? But the poet did not frighten the king's wrath, and he replied with dignity: - All the royal wisdom, mercy and power and all military glory fit in this name, and anyone who reads it, immediately imagine all the acts committed by the king. After all, the name is a symbol of your kingdom, and it is in itself above the thickest book of praise. So I was right before you, calling what was written by my hand, an incomparable hymn, glorifying you and your deeds!

Hmm, now I'll remember one of the last. Once upon a long time in the Middle Empire - at that time they called China - the best, most powerful fighters gathered in the tournament from around the world. The great Chinese sage judged the contest. Finally, after many thousands of fights, he chose the three greatest warriors and asked each of them to tell how he trains. The first to rise was a huge fierce warrior and said: "Every morning at sunrise I break down trees, stones, boards - everything that comes to my way. Around my house on the day of the journey everything is turned to dust, into the desert. "Fine," said the sage. - And how do you train? He asked another soldier. A tall, lean man rose up, more like a monk or an ascetic. "Every morning at sunrise," he said, "I indulge in meditation. I take my body under the control of reason and will and make it be light and fast, like a thought. "Fine," said the sage. - And how do you train? He asked the third warrior. A very ordinary, unremarkable, outward man rose up. If he had not just won a thousand bouts yet, no one would have thought that it was a warrior, and even a great one. "I do not train at all," said the third. "It's just that I try to be present in everything I do."

Yes really at least someone began to understand us. Wow. So came insight in life. So listen. There was Godelo. He had a wife who constantly sawed him for the fact that his father prevented them from living, and could not Godelo calm his wife. Father Godelo, listening to the cries of his wife every day, beckons his son, and says to him: "Son, I see that I am interfering with your presence with your family well-being, let me go to the mountains to live ..." - It was good to say that after listening to my father I began to refuse, but there's nothing to do ... The father began to assemble, as he beckoned to his son and said to him: - I have only one problem, I myself will not go to the mountains, let me put you in the basket on your shoulders, and there I'm like myself. "Good," agreed Godelo. He put his father in a basket and carried him to the mountains. Brought his father, landed, then he was afraid to leave, as his father says to him: - Wait a son, do not forget to grab your basket, if your son is of little use. Then Godelo became ashamed, he realized his mistake, repented, put his father back in the basket and brought back home. ... And the evil wife from the house drove out.

Well, as you say, there is such a trend among the experienced walkers. Then we'll sit down on one or the other. Listen. One pilgrim walked not one thousand steps to meet the Teacher and, finally, appeared before him, asking to share the highest wisdom. "Then take a sip from this stream and describe to me the taste of water." The teacher told him. "I already heard and understand this Truth," the Seeker said, a little disappointed. - Tell me, what do you understand? Asked the Teacher. "The taste of water can not be described in words, water must be drunk, there is no need to talk about it, so too is the truth ..." "Now imagine - I'm sitting by the brook, and a crowd such as you stand in line for me to describe to them the taste of water, although many of them have already heard this description from other Teachers.

Heh, when it's already one year balancing between life and death, then any fool will sooner or later become a philosopher. So listen. On the way there was a girl, beautiful, like a fairy. Suddenly she noticed that a man was following her. She turned and asked: "Tell me, why are you following me?" The man replied: "Oh, master of my heart, your charms are so irresistible that they command me to follow you." People say that I play beautifully on the lute, that I am dedicated to the secrets of the art of poetry and that I am able to awaken the torments of love in the hearts of women. And I want to explain to you in love, because you have captivated my heart! The beauty silently stared at him for a while, then said: "How could you fall in love with me?" My younger sister is much prettier and more attractive than me. She follows me, look at her. The man stopped, then turned around, but saw only an ugly old woman in a patched mantle. Then he accelerated his steps to catch up with the girl. He lowered his eyes and asked in a voice expressing obedience: "Tell me, how could a lie get out of your mouth?" She smiled and replied: "You, my friend, did not tell me the truth either when you swore love." You know perfectly all the rules of love and pretend that your heart is blazing with love for me. How could you turn around to look at another woman?

Well - not so much we are more than cool philosophers. Just lovers to read something that really has a price. So I'm telling you. One trader sent his son to learn the Secret of Happiness from the wisest of all people. The young man walked for forty days through the desert and, at last, approached the beautiful castle standing on the mountain top. There also lived the wise man whom he was looking for. However, instead of the expected meeting with the wise man, our hero got into the hall, where everything was boiling: traders came in and out, people were talking in the corner, a small orchestra was playing sweet melodies and there was a table set with the most exquisite dishes of this area. The wise man talked with different people, and the young man had to wait about two hours to wait his turn. The wise man listened attentively to the explanation of the young man about the purpose of his visit, but said in reply that he did not have time to reveal the Secret of Happiness to him. And invited him to walk around the palace and come again in two hours. "However, I want to ask for one favor," the sage added, holding out to the young man a small spoon, into which he had drunk two drops of oil. "Keep this spoon in your hand all the time, so that the oil does not pour." The young man began to climb and descend the palace stairs, not taking his eyes off the spoon. Two hours later he returned to the sage. "Well," he asked, "did you see the Persian carpets that are in my dining room?" Have you seen the park that the chief gardener created for ten years? Did you notice the beautiful parchments in my library? The young man in confusion had to admit that he had not seen anything. His only concern was not to shed a drop of oil, which the sage entrusted him. "Well, come back and get acquainted with the wonders of my universe," the sage told him. - You can not trust a person if you are not familiar with the house in which he lives. Calmed down, the young man took a spoon and again went for a walk around the palace; This time, paying attention to all the works of art, hung on the walls and ceilings of the palace. He saw the gardens surrounded by mountains, the most delicate flowers, the subtlety with which each of the works of art was placed exactly where it was needed. Returning to the sage, he described in detail everything he saw. "And where are those two drops of oil that I trusted you?" Asked the Sage. And the young man, looking at the spoon, found that all the oil had poured out. "This is the only advice I can give you: The secret of Happiness is to look at all the wonders of the world, while never forgetting two drops of oil in your spoon.

Hmm, now I'll remember one of the last. Once upon a time there was an old monarch in the Indian kingdom-state, who all his life solved for himself one purely eastern question: what is the essence of strength? And he decided, in the end, to find the strongest man in his possessions, in order to learn from him what the essence of strength is. As a reward to this hero, the Indian king appointed a horse from his stables, and at the request of the winner of the announced contest: he wants white - he will get a white horse, he wants a black horse - he will get a black horse as a gift. In order to solve this difficult task, the choice of the eternal problem, he collected the wisest people of his kingdom and sent them with the inspection of cities and towns. The task of the monarch was really incredibly difficult - the sages trampled not one pair of sandals, but they did not find the strongest man. They arranged competitions, gave the contenders for the victory many tasks, but the effect was zero: none of the subjects of the Indian king could claim unconditionally for the right to be called the strongest man in the Indian kingdom. The sages are already quite desperate to find a man who they could give with a clear conscience to choose one of the best horses of the royal stables ... At heart these "experts" scraped the cat - do not take down their heads! And suddenly, passing through some small Indian village, they noticed a giant man. He was lying on a huge trestle in the middle of a large garden that surrounded his house. "What a tremendous power is hidden in this man!" - the sages exclaimed and decided to subject him to three tests. "Can you break a horseshoe with one hand?" The wise men of the giant man asked. The same did not answer them, but simply took and broke his hand with a horseshoe. "And can you pull out the tree?" The sages again asked him. The same did not answer them, but simply wrapped a ten-meter-high tree with both hands and pulled it out of the ground with one stroke. "Truly, you are strong, man! But can you block the river? "The sages asked for the third time." The giant man did not answer them, but went up to the river, lifted a huge stone lying on the shore and threw it into the stream and the river stood up. "Glory to the gods! Exclaimed the wise men. "Truly, you are the strongest man on earth!" Choose any of the royal horses: if you want - take a black, you want - white! " And only the giant man raised his hand over his head to scratch his head before announcing his decision, when suddenly a small, frail woman in a dark dress appeared on the threshold of his house. "Husband, I warn you: choose a white - you do not like it, I can not vouch for myself!"

Yes really at least someone began to understand us. Wow. So came insight in life. So listen. There was a case when the wife of one prince approached Genghis Khan, asking her to release her relatives. Genghis Khan said: - Here, in front of you are your husband, your son, and your brother. I will only let one go, whom do you choose? Without hesitation, she replied: - Brother. "Explain to me why?" The woman said: - I can find a husband, I can give birth to a son, but I can not create a brother. After hearing, Genghis Khan released all three.

Well, as you say, there is such a trend among the experienced walkers. Then we'll sit down on one or the other. Listen. ... The gate of Zhundu opened, and the steppe people poured into the richest city of the Celestial, screaming and waving their weapons violently. Li Kui, known in Zhundu as Nosy Li, a tramp without a clan and tribe, who came to town from the very time before the invasion, - a tiny and ruffled Lee Kui, limping, ran along the alleys of the western outskirts, hoping for luck. If the great Guanyin helps him to leave unharmed, he will become a shaven-headed heshan monk in saffron cassocks, living alms and indifferent to worldly vanity - and let other fools give risky advice to the meager Son of Heaven, the dumb emperor, and let the unfortunate Celestial Empire be raped and robbed All who are not lazy, though greedy dignitaries, at least dirty Mongols, though ... Before he realized that Guanyin was looking the other way today, Nosaty Lee stopped short, hissed in pain on the injured knee, and threw up a short, three-arm, staff. At the end of the alley, a tall Mongol wounded joyfully in leather armor, playing with a long spear with a crossbar under the tip of the tip. The disgraced commander Li Kui, who was named Nosatym Li in Zhundu, and in the capital - the Blue Tiger Hou, took a deep breath and slowly went to the smirking steppe, forcing his will to stop limping. Mongol waited until the frail ragamack came closer, and lazily jabbed a spear in front of him. A moment later, the weapon almost escaped his hands, and when the astonished warrior managed to jump back, clinging his spear stinging upward, a stick hollowed from inside flew to his face, in which, like a silkworm in a cocoon, a straight sword was hiding from idle eyes -Jian of the Blue Tiger Hou. The city was already burning. Bitter smoke stelilsja the streets Chzhundu, uvlekshihsja ahead of plundering warriors indomitable Temudzhina Genghis Khan; smoke in a hurry, before making his way into the Western outskirts of invaders, from Gary pershilo acid in the throat and leg ache unbearably Whether kuya, and Mongol Beale skillfully and fiercely, the tip, the reverse side of the flagpole, and therefore had to move much until the Guanyin deigned not to turn his benevolent gaze on Chzhundu and on a deserted Lane, in which Lee managed to get twice-nosed blade wrist Mongol. Now I could only wait. Wait and do not turn under the spear, the movements of which became increasingly uncertain and trembling. And after waiting - to put the last forces into the last jump. ... He never released the spear, this unlucky warrior in light leather armor. Coughing and skosobochivshis, he sat at the wall of someone's house, his right palm clamped pierced his side, while the left continued to hold a spear lying next to him. And above them, over the wounded Mongol and the impotent spear, Li Qui, former commander of the left wing of Lee, former Blue Tiger Hou, former Nosaty Li, future rector of the monastery near the mountain of Wutai Shan, stood panting and trying not to bear weight on the injured leg, tired little human. He stood and watched the Mongolian face become more and more pale, and the incised wrists bleed less and less. Mongol barely lifted his head - and their glances met. Lee Kui sighed, tore his cloak on the stripes, crouched next to the Mongol and began to bandage the arms of the invincible Chinggis warrior. Lee did not know why he was doing it ...

Heh, when it's already one year balancing between life and death, then any fool will sooner or later become a philosopher. So listen. The royal daughter with her beauty was like the moon and enchanted all those who were awarded at least once to look at her. One day a dervish, preparing to refresh himself, brought a piece of bread to his mouth, when he suddenly saw her and froze in amazement. His fingers unclenched themselves, and the bread fell to the ground. Passing by, the princess smiled at the dervish. Delight put his body in awe, bread remained lying in the dust, and he almost lost his senses. In this state dervish stayed seven years. His house became a street, neighbors - stray dogs. The mad dervish bored the princess, and her bodyguards decided to kill him. Then she called him to her and told him: "No union between us is possible." You must leave the city immediately, because my servants want to kill you. The unfortunate lover replied: "Since I saw you, life has no value for me." They will shed innocent blood. But before I die, I conjure you, grant my only desire, for you are the cause of my death. Tell me, why did you then smile at me? - Fool! Said the princess. "When I saw how ridiculous you put yourself, I smiled out of pity - and that's all." And, having said so, the princess disappeared.

Well - not so much we are more than cool philosophers. Just lovers to read something that really has a price. So I'm telling you. Between the two sages there was a conversation about love. One said: - The property of love - always bring torment and misfortune, and the lover always suffers and suffers. Another objected: - Shut up, you apparently never experienced the sweetness of reconciliation after a quarrel and never knew the taste of the connection after separation. No one in the world is cleaner and more tender than the pure soul in love, and there is no dirtier than anyone who is far from the idea of ??love. In the beauty of the man's heart is the reflection of the glow of love: If the heart is ugly, beauty does not honor it! Let the ignorant remember the saying of the wise: Where the breed is honored breed, - the soul affinity is approved.

Hmm, now I'll remember one of the last. Once there was only one man, possessed by insane love and exhausted by love torments. The beauty of the one whom he loved was incomparable even with the beauty of the paradise virgins. About such as she, said that its beauty, it overshadowed both the Sun and the Moon. And besides, her incomparable beauty was dangerous to people not only because she threatened every deadly torment of love, but also because this beauty was smart and ruthless. And once a man in love with her, thinking that he was alone, said to himself: - Oh my God! Her face is more beautiful than a rose, and the mill is slimmer than a cypress tree! Her whole face is brighter than a peacock, and her gait is more graceful than that of a pheasant! But it turned out that his beloved at that time was nearby and heard his words. Openly presented to him, she said: "You probably wanted to flatter me with your comparisons, but they only angered me, and I consider them to be shameful." Now you have compared my face to a rose, but where did you see such beautiful eyes and eyebrows as roses? You compared my camp with cypress, but does cypress have my mobility and ardor? You compared all my appearance to a peacock, but did someone burn with love, contemplating peacocks? You compared my tread to the pheasant's tread, but who of the people will take care of his soul, remembering the walking pheasant? - Forgive me! Cried the lover. - I foolishly imagined that you can be described in words! These words further angered the moon-faced, and in anger she said: "For this foolishness of yours, I'll kill you!" Then the lover fell at her feet with the words: "O unparalleled unearthly Beauty!" All my awkward speeches were caused by my true and pure love for you. There is no malice, no reproach, no complaint at all in them, and if they seemed inappropriate to you, then be good and do not take me severe for this fault, consider them a sign of my ignorance and ignorance, and I myself will perish From shame and shame! And so long he sought and said the words of repentance that the beautiful woman had calmed down and abandoned her intention to take revenge on this man in love with her.

Yes really at least someone began to understand us. Wow. So came insight in life. So listen. In the old days there was one thief. Once he robbed the treasure of the padishah. After the thief, the padishah sent all his detectives. The thief was seized and robbed of his loot. Here the padishah asked his chief vizier: "What should I do with this thief?" "We need to assemble the whole population of the city and kill the thief with all the people," the vizier answered. And the padishah had a daughter. The padishah asked her: - Does the vizier speak correctly? "The Vizier judged in essence," the girl answered. Then the padishah asked the middle vizier: "What should I do with this thief?" - We need to add more firewood, put a thief on them and set them on fire. And again the padishah asked his daughter: - How do you find what the Vizier said? And the daughter of the padishah again answered: - Your vizier judged in fact. Finally the padishah asked his younger vizier: "What should I do with the thief?" - It is necessary to put the thief from head to foot, give him everything, so that his stomach is always full, and let him go. The Padishah again asked his daughter: - How do you find what the Vizier said? "Your vizier judged in essence," answered the girl. Then the padishah said: "You talked about each of the three viziers that he judged in essence." What do you mean, explain to us. And the girl answered: "The chief vizier, who said that the thief must be slaughtered, by origin, must be from the butchers." It seems that your average vizier is made of brick burners. And the younger vizier is inherently noble. The Padishah checked, and it turned out that the girl was right. The thief was treated, as the younger vizier advised: they fed him enough to eat, they gave money to spend money and saved him from death. And the younger Vizier was made the chief vizier.

Well, as you say, there is such a trend among the experienced walkers. Then we'll sit down on one or the other. Listen. Once a gang of robbers went to rob. Having ransacked many things, they began to divide them among themselves. All the shares were equal, and only the dress of the finest threads, it was considered the worst part, was given to the weakest in the gang. And he, weak, having received his share, was enraged. He began to shout that he had been circumvented. When he came to the city to sell his outfit, all the eminent rich people began to offer him big money. What he got alone, was twice as much as all his companions, taken together. Then he rejoiced and jumped with joy. This is similar to how laypeople, not knowing whether retribution will result in the distribution of alms or not, give out a small charity (part of their income). When they are reborn in heaven and experience immense bliss, they begin to regret - they regret that they did not give out an extensive charity (of their entire state). They are like the one who, having received a lot of money for the dress, rejoiced. With the distribution of charity the same thing: they get a lot for small businesses. That is why, together with glee, they regret the incompleteness of the deed.

Heh, when it's already one year balancing between life and death, then any fool will sooner or later become a philosopher. So listen. Once upon a time there was one family: a husband, a wife and a daughter. This family was poor, pre-poor, barely made ends meet. The husband and his wife began to think how they could get rich. "We live in poverty now. Let's find some rich man, we'll stay with him, we'll see what he's doing, and we'll imitate him in everything. So they did. They broke their hut and built a new one next to the house of the rich sethei. Sethei forced his employees to cultivate the field and garden, and then sent them to sell the crop. The poor tried to imitate the Sethei, in what they could, they worked in the field, and then a part of the crop was sold at the market. Gradually, their business went better and better, prosperity grew. The husband and his wife decided to thank the Sethei, from whom they secretly learned to farm. My husband took a handful of gold and went to the rich man. "Why did you bring me gold?" The sethei was surprised. - I was poor. We decided with my wife to break our hut, settle near your house and imitate you in everything. Our business quickly went into harmony, the family became rich, and we thank you for accepting our gift. "Since you yourself think that you have gained all your wealth thanks to me, it means that this is my wealth." You must give me all your fortune, and I'll decide how much to allocate to you. "But I did not remain ungrateful and brought you gold." If I knew that you would demand all my state, then I would not bring you anything. A long time the Sethei and the former poor man argued. Finally, they turned to the judge. The judge could not resolve their dispute and led both to the king. The former poor man bowed and said: "Your Majesty, I settled next to the Sethei's house, watched him go into the farm, send his workers to the field and trade in the bazaar." I began to imitate the Sethei, as I could, and achieved prosperity and success in business. Out of gratitude, I brought gold to the sethey, who helped me, without knowing it, but the sethey demands all my state. I ask you, Your Majesty, to understand this matter in justice. The king turned to the Sethei: - Correctly stated the case of this man? "It's all right, Your Majesty." The king realized that the Sethei was not too greedy, and said: "Sethay, do you have children?" "Son, Your Majesty." - And you have? - the king turned to the former poor. "Daughter, Your Majesty." "In order for there to be no quarrel between you, I command both families to become related." Then you will have nothing to share. Sethhey and the former poor bowed low to the king and retired to follow the wise royal decision.

Well - not so much we are more than cool philosophers. Just lovers to read something that really has a price. So I'm telling you. There lived in the desert a man-recluse. Once in his homeland, he was a good carpenter. But his life, by chance, threw him into the desert. About this master learned one rich man and found him, turned to him: - They say that you are a good master. So I want to order an oak table and chairs for my room. I will come for my order in a month and pay it well. And left. After the appointed time the rich man again came to the master and asked: "Where are my tables and chairs?" - Yes, I'm a good master. But this is not enough. In order for me to fulfill your order, I still need a tree and an instrument that I do not have ... One desire is not enough: we also need opportunities ...

Hmm, now I'll remember one of the last. In the army of Shamil came a letter to some warrior with a notice that his wife had died. The letter was received by Shamil himself. He decided to check that warrior and sent for him. When he came, Shamil said: "You received a letter with the news that your father was dead." "If so, then the roof of our house has fallen off, and I need to go home," answered the warrior. "No, my father did not die, but your brother died." "Then the wall of the house collapsed, and I must go to the funeral." "It turns out that my brother did not die, but your mother died." "So the house began to fail." We must go home. "Not your mother, but your sister passed away." - A flower fell from my heart - I have to go home. "I checked you." In fact, your wife died. "If so, then the whole house collapsed and nothing left of it." Now I do not need to go home.

Yes really at least someone began to understand us. Wow. So came insight in life. So listen. Two men went to meet each other. One hurried to the aid of his benefactor, and the other was in a hurry to celebrate. They met each other on a narrow bridge and did not want to give way to each other. They argued, argued and turned to the judge. The judge in their case could not figure it out, led both to the king. The king asked: - Explain to me why you did not want to give each other the way? One of the disputants replied: "Your Majesty, I was in a hurry to celebrate, I met this person on the bridge, but he did not miss me." The second disputant said: "A man once did me a great favor. Now he's in trouble. I hurried to his aid. That's why I did not give way. The king made the following decision: - Anyone who was in a hurry for the holiday should pay damages to those who hurried to help their benefactor.
What intresnogo of life you can tell?
Quite entertaining.

The regiment in which I served had a rather large subsidiary farm. A decent sized greenhouse, a pigsty and even there was a horse named Bouquet. And in the pigsty, the pigs were looked after by the conscript-martyr, the gypsy by nationality. One winter, a pig was drugged. Everyone was happy, the piglets were counted, entered, and at night one died ... In the morning, he comes to see the girl in childbirth, and the gypsy (I do not remember any name or surname) present him with a newcomer. What should I do? Have written down one. And the gypsy, do not be a fool, the dead pig did not throw out, but put it in a snowdrift. In a day or two, a living pig takes it (I do not remember it for a long time, I just ate it with the sidekicks, or I sold it to the local), and presents the formerly dead, providently zanykany in the snowdrift. Have written one more. And he again went to a snowdrift. Alas, with a second attempt to divide the authorities in the same way, the scam failed. The commander of the regiment was very angry when he was told about it. I personally showed up at the pigsty. For some reason, he especially did not like the receiver standing in the room where this gypsy spent the night. Healthy such, the ancient radiola, in the wooden case. And he forced this soldier to drag this receiver in his arms from the pigsty to the regimental parade ground, where the entire regiment was standing. And then march along with the receiver on the parade ground. And the question asked: "How long?" Answered: "While Nikolai Slichenko does not sing ...".

A large diesel submarine was in the sea, in combat service. According to the daily plan, the so-called emergency response measures were carried out, aimed at preventing later from actual accidents. In the central post the deputy commander of the brigade peacefully gnawed the cracker. The comrade was very violent, but that day he did not touch anyone. And in the crew of the boat was a midshipman named Fire, a man from the breed of those who are all and always need. This time, for some reason, he suddenly needed a lockbrig. When it turned out that the midshipman was not in the regular place, they gave the command on the boat: - Report, in which compartment is the midshipman Fire! The team was given and in the bustle about it was immediately forgotten. Suddenly, from the diesel compartment, through loud-speaker communication, they reported: - Central, Fire in the fifth compartment! (But in the oral speech of the capital letters are not visible! The reaction of the central post was instant and unambiguous. There were short calls, followed by words that made even the thickest skinners shudder: - Emergency alarm! Fire in the fifth compartment! It was from what the soul go into the heels. In the diesel compartment, there is even something to burn ... The boatswain on the team shifted the horizontal rudders to the ascent, the acousticians listened to the horizon tensely (not to collide with anyone on the surface), the bilge were preparing to use a very serious fire-extinguishing system on the fifth compartment. The central post shouted: - Fifth! Fifth, report the situation! What is there burning in you ?! The dieselists answered calmly and embarrassedly: - Yes, we do not burn anything. There was a command: to report in which compartment the midshipman Fire is, here we reported. After the cessation of the emergency alarm in the central office, the "analysis of flights" took place with the use of all terms from the naval lexicon. Then zamkombrig announced by loud-speaker communication: "Attention, comrades, the submariners!" From now on and until the end of the autonomy, this name will be Ivanov !!!.

In the early 2000s, I actively participated in the conduct and preparation of various charitable events, where the main trump card was the opportunity not for a non-commercial basis to meet on equal terms with very serious people. Well, the children, of course, help. When organizing one of these events, held in a departmental hotel, I helped a woman from the class "I can do everything, but I do not want anything for myself." In exchange for a huge amount of work to prepare and raise funds, I was promised several extremely valuable contacts among sponsors. As a matter of fact, every charity event, especially large-scale, there are 4 main categories of people — these are real sponsors, event organizers together with various artists, etc. "attendants" children or other recipients of charitable aid, and actually, the category you want to stress because of it discussed further — their Majesties Haljavshhiki. Of course, not all freeloaders are full-fledged freeloaders - some of them contribute a small fraction to the fund for helping children, but understand me correctly, if they cover a banquet for sponsors for 100 bucks per person, then they do not expect 200 rubles for the purchased lottery ticket. At the very beginning of the event, I looked around the hall and noticed each of the 4 groups of guests. There were not many freeloaders this time - they were still in control, but still they were present, because the table was full of food and drinks, and the program included performances of stars and other joys. The evening was divided into 2 parts - during the first there was a story about who is going to get money, children's performance and in prison - charity auction. It is on him that there are full freeloaders. For they never buy anything and try not to glow before the auctioneer actively working with the hall, and often even for the time of the auction quietly shed from the audience (charity auctions differ in that they often sell the work of the children themselves, and without active work with the hall In terms of promoting the product of children's creativity, the proceeds of the auction will be scanty). It was at the auction that I was very surprised by the behavior of one of the freeloaders, who drew my attention from the first glance to the hall. It was a guy of about 30 with a tail, a completely rural look, very simply dressed (although freeloaders always try to merge with others) and with the look of a child from a small Siberian city, who was taken to the Kremlin for the first time in his life. The guy did not even buy a lottery ticket, which completely killed me. Since the organizer work was just too much, and it all lay on my young shoulders (I was 22 years old), but the event was responsible and as it was said in the well-known film "these are the children!", In general I gave all the best. During the interval, the woman I helped fulfilled my promise and really introduced me to several very serious people from Russia and not only. On my question, is there really someone cool, she hesitated and said that she can not answer. Actually, even the contacts received were enough for serious achievements, and I decided to score. During the second part there were performances by artists, in whose organizations I took part. And whether the stars so agreed, or the atmosphere had - in general, the holiday was a success on URA with a capital letter - the sponsors were burning eyes, sweat was pouring from me and I had not eaten anything since morning. The freeloader I noticed rejoiced like a child, slapped and ate for both cheeks. After the end of the event, all guests went around with a piggy bank - they threw in an amount that no one really expected, but freeloaders at best shipped there by a hundred rubles, and my village guest - nothing at all. In general, the woman - organizer was happy. And when the guests began to disperse, she said - "Okay, you helped me a lot, I'll show you" the hero of our time. "But you will give me my word of honor that you will not tell anyone about him and you will not pester him with questions, he is extremely shy A man and never shines on part of his help. This man financed the construction of new buildings of our orphanage for 300 children and all the surrounding infrastructure, and besides, he led a gas pipeline to them from the nearest settlement. I gave her my word. We went out the door of the hotel together and she showed me to that very village guy who got behind the wheel of the usual second-hand Volga. To say that I had a revolution in my head is not to say anything. The fact is that I personally saw this construction, which was just the simplicity of revolutionary speed. And even at that time I understood very well how much gas is worth pumping and what I need to be, that would be agreed upon in such a short time. It was at that moment that the understanding of the expression "a truly serious person" came to me. Since when I'm looking at "freeloaders" at such events, I always remember these children's eyes full of love and simple joy, and I am looking for such people among them. Happens - I find. And immediately I understand everything ..

It was a long time ago. In the early 90's. I worked as a young specialist in one famous institute that compiled OUR supercomputers. Money did not pay much and had to be tricked. Once we went to another salary in Perm. There, some cooperative sold it to a local plant like NefteorgSintez, to encourage its employees, a batch of Chinese shit (players, toasters, a pair of TV sets). Of course, the percentage of marriage went off over 50. Well, and so, the story: Having been encouraged by these wonders of technology, we are sitting at the airport, the weather is bad, snowing with rain. Flight to Moscow for the second time postponed. We drink in a restaurant. After a while I understand: I can not drink more - and you can die! Give, I think, I'll go through the frost - I'll soot up a bit ... and carried me to the airfield. I look: some military transport is loaded. - Where are we flying? - I ask. - To Moscow. "Take it with you." - Carry three bubbles and climb aboard. — Gut! I fly with bullet for vodka, a bag with a pair of panties for some reason already with me, and back. Flew very fun. In my opinion, the crew was drinking with us. (I vaguely remember the phrase that was thrown by a man in the pilot's uniform: "Take off - hnya! The main thing is to sit down!") We sat down in Zhukovsky. On UAZ, under the tarpaulin, they were taken out of the territory. Then I do not remember. Four hours a night, I sleep in the soft bed of the house. The phone rings. The wife reluctantly picks up the receiver. Through a dream I hear how she tries to say something to the person at that end for about five minutes ... Finally, a phone rings to me with the words: "Tell him this!" "Alla," I say. - Who is it? Dimon, are you? - Well. Pause. - Yep your mother! Shithead! Fucking! Etc. - We here put all the Perm police on their ears! Man with money is gone! Traffic policemen visiting cars are browsing. The plane left without us (this is a regular flight)! And you, you bastard, you sleep on the soft sofa at home! In general, the next day I took a sick leave. Just in case...

It was a long time ago, when the planes were drunk, and there were no terrorists. Flying a watch at us, one guy, well, say Vasya. A month at work thumps, the month of the house is fasting, because you will not get very clear. The last day of the watch Noted with the peasants, and in a state of autopilot with the help of the same miserable aircraft. And picking up the bus from the territory of the base, lies his backpack, And kind jokers, who are everywhere enough, throw a valve in the backpack. The valve is such a thing 25 cm long, with a diameter of 8.3 cm and weight of a kilo four. Everything, loading, flight, meeting with the beloved wife, the salary is immediately selected, Junk from the backpack to the laundry, on the floor of the piece of iron. "Vasya, why is this?" Who wants to admit that you were bred and for three thousand miles you dragged an unnecessary piece of iron. "It's for the dacha, the right thing, and you go to the store." My wife went to the store, Vasya looks angry at the devil with a hangover, and throws him in disgust at the window. Steps of the wife in the hall, on the table, an object is placed on the table, resembling a healing potion of forty revolutions, Vasya opens his eyes. - Vasechka, you pulled this spare part, I'm going from the store, I look under the window the same is lying. The Vasin Valve stands proudly on the table ..

He gave his duty to the Motherland as a radio-radio operator at the reserve command post "Zhilny" in 1978-1980. I had a habit of saluting officers without their headdress. We had a deputy major in charge, I do not remember Fio, the shit was terrible. Our commander, Filipok, Phillipov, commander from God, called me. I go into the office and as I should by the statute report, attaching my right hand to my temple. And since he was on alert, removing headphones did not put on a pilot's jacket. With Philip was also our deputy. He says: - Do not put an arm against an empty head. I would not say anything, but the devil pulled me to answer: - There is also a head in a cap with a cockade buzzing like an empty jug. Filipok smiled, and the deputy politician skewed. All, I think, the lip is assured. After listening to the order and replying: "Yes, allow me to do it." I left the office. I do not know how other officers learned about this incident, but within three hours I began to prophesy to become a general. By the way, all the officers when meeting with us, the soldiers of urgent service after giving honor greeted the hand, one zampolit never gave his hand ..

The usual hose is a long rubber gut. "To pretend to be a hose" for a Soviet soldier is the same as playing in misunderstandings, passively sabotaging the orders of the commanders' fathers. Sometimes at the expense of their colleagues, so "planes" - those who take the service seriously and by any means gain positive points in the eyes of their bosses (they are cut off) - do not really like hoses. However, there are hoses in the law, similar to the Russian spy Shtirlitsa: "What to catch it, he's cunning still get out." They are treated with love. A rare soldier-conscript does not want to return home as soon as possible. Most often they dream of it. Someone tries to bite. In our part there was a legend about a soldier who, for the first time entering the barracks, immediately went to look for the heaviest weight, and after discovering it, immediately began to swing his right hand. He was engaged in this every free moment, being in every way encouraged for such zeal by a company commander. Just a month later, the kid came to the hospital and said: - At me, that, the left hand dries ... Nachmed personally measured the circumference of the biceps of both hands, but only naturally recorded the difference in the results, as was required by the instruction ... "Let's check the trend, warrior," said the major, slightly surprised. After a couple of weeks of even more intensive training with weight, the difference increased, and by the end of the calendar month the comic soldier went to his native Grodno ... Followers of it for some reason was not, apparently, even very stupid it was clear that the epidemic of desiccations would not go unnoticed ..

This story occurred at a time when my uncle served in the ranks of the Soviet army, around 80 years. As if in their military unit, two soldiers brought sand on the dump truck of the ZIL system. In principle, a truck-dumper is very convenient thing, drove up where it should, jerked the lever, and loose material falls out into a neat pile, yielding to the laws of gravity. But as it was in the deep fall with variable rains and frost, the sand in the back of the truck was a little freezing. And to get enough sleep, as far as the slope, not really wanted. However, the driver with the partner was an example of a healthy pofigizma and judged that at the highest point of the body lifting the sand will not hold in any case and the sky will fall to the earth. Usually this is what happens, but our comrades pofigists did not take into account that they put the car under a slight bias. And not the poured sand seriously increases the center of gravity of their typewriter, as a result ZILok falls to one side (with the sand finally falling off the body), in the cabin, of course, fall on each other our soldiers. The history, however, is quite ordinary - dump trucks are capsized quite often. The most interesting happens right after the fall, a crowd of soldiers who watched with interest the process of unloading immediately rises to the cabin of ZIL, with powerful brushes and improvised materials, knocks out almost all the glass and pulls out two of our comrades from the cabin, grabbing for anything, as a result of one torn The form of the second is scratched face. As it turned out, the watching soldiers were frightened of the explosion and decided to heroically save our drivers ..

I do not remember who told me this story, but it was so. This story happened back in the days of the Soviet army. In one of the areas of our vast country there was a military unit, I do not remember what direction. Either infantry, or artillery, but it does not matter. So imagine, a quiet, dark summer night, the whole part of sleeping strong, bogatyrskim sleep. In one of the barracks, as are awake duty Rota (Sergeant starosluzhashhij, who left retirement just over a month) and private-Soviet (only to "spirit") a young stands on the bedside table, all the forces struggling with sleep, and Sergeant hard snoozing in the so-called "Leninist room" at once, as this will play a role in future, on-call and have one's Messman's only weapon is a knife bayonet, which meet strict as for other weapons. And one fine moment when the night was in full swing, the young soldier suddenly realizes that either his stomach has not yet adjusted to soldier's food, or he has caught some infection, or both. And that if he does not take urgent action, then all the contents of his intestine drain into his boots. Exhausted and full of flour in a whisper, not to wake the company, he calls the duty officer. He whispered and whispered and cursing all the "spirits" who do not let him calmly finish his demobilization, asks the reason for which his sweet dream was broken. Young quickly, clearly and briefly, as taught by the military regulations, sets out the cause of the alarm. The sergeant, grumbling and again cursing all the young and their tender mother's mamas, lets the orderly go to the toilet, and he gets up. It should be noted that the fruits of civilization in the form of sewerage have not yet reached this part, and for the management of natural needs there was a stand-alone wooden toilet, in the most remote place, with three points, and without any partitions. And now, young with an enviable speed, having overcome the distance from the barracks to the sanostroeniya, unbuttoning his ammunition, perched on one of the holes and blissfully relaxed. And then, at the very apogee of this action, the bayonet knife, issued for the defense of the Motherland, slides off the belt and falls into the hole with a deaf and mocking "bully". When a soldier understands what has happened, the forces of the urge of his fifth point intensify threefold. There are scenes in his head like he will be judged for the loss of military weapons, but even worse, what the sergeant will do to him - "demobilized" Collecting the remnants of his will, sweating with fear, he flocks to the barracks and tells all the sergeant. When the sergeant understands that he will be bailed out no less, and maybe more, and that his demobil will be moved to the very end of the line, the urge in his stomach begins already with him. But the Russian soldier, as they say, is unbeatable and will find a way out of any situation. Without thinking twice, the sergeant finds, as it seems to him, the only solution at the moment. He dresses a young man in a suit OZK (combined arms protective kit, designed to protect against chemical weapons), a gas mask and sends it back. Type, go, dive, look and without a knife do not come back. Young, not hesitating, he began to execute the order. But now, not lucky, at this very time, the duty officer, a major of the Soviet army, was impatient. He goes to the above-mentioned institution and, with a pacified look, settles himself over the hole. And now imagine the reaction of the major, when from the next point, suddenly something crawls out in a gas mask, all in shit and with a dagger in his hand. As the assistant on duty later explained, the major flew into the duty room with wild eyes, with one hand supporting unfastened pants, the other hand waving the timekeeper Makarov, he was carrying shit on a verst and was yelling furiously, either about the saboteurs, or About the evil spirit. As a result, the part was raised by alarm. After the proceedings, both soldiers were stuck in for 15 days of guardhouse, and the major was sent to heal nerves ..

Here is how it was. In one of the military units, training jumps were conducted. The very process of a jump, as such, with the usual airborne parachute (D-5) does not seem quite complicated. Drop out over the side of the plane, you think to yourself: "501, 502, 503" - and after this, flying at least 60 meters during this time, you try to find the filled dome of your parachute over your head. Finding the dome in the proper place, you land carefully. At all, everything happened according to plan - fell out, opened the dome, landed. But the trouble is, one poor fellow was unlucky. No, the dome opened, but he did not reach the ground. A gust of wind carried it to the pines that surrounded the landing area. And here's a picture of butter: in the branches of a mighty ship pine at an altitude of about 10 meters, dangles, in the manner of puppets, a fighter. It is not possible to reach the trunk, it's possible to crawl up the slings, but there is still the same problem of descent to the ground. Usually, in such cases they open a spare parachute (it is located on the chest) and, using its slings, descend to the ground. Since the fighter is young, several advisers hurried to him at once. After enjoying the picture, everyone began to shout in chorus: "Toss the spare!". Then everything happened like in a movie. Already an orderly frightened paratrooper snatched the strapping cutter ... in one fell swoop broke the lines of the main parachute and in the fall pulled the ring of the spare parachute ... R. S. I have to admit that the record for skydiving from super low altitudes was not established at that time ..

There was a student in my group at the military department, named Yellow. Masturbation is unique, apparently from the womb yet. Well, it happened with him the usual trouble for students - during self-training caught his officer-teacher enthusiastically playing cards with another blast ... well, that is, a student. As punishment, the children were left after class, gave them a bucket of quick-drying paint, brushes and an order to paint all the tables and chairs that were in the classroom. The work was done, handed over to the duty officer, the brushes were cleaned ... The next morning the cleaning lady came to wash the floors and the first thing she did was turn all the chairs over, putting them on the tables. Her second action was a trip to the teaching, where she returned from the deputy. The head of the department and demonstrated to him repeatedly repeated on the reverse unpainted side of the chairs familiar to all from childhood three letters. A couple of cheerful painters appeared on the same day before the bright eyes of the head of the department. "Well, then what are you doing, comrade students, your mother, do?" The chief scolded them gently. Yellow suddenly stretched out into the frut, clicked his heels and reported "Excuse me, Comrade Colonel, it broke out!" "It's how many times you broke out," the Colonel marveled. - But how much broke, so much and wrote - phlegmatically finished Yellow ..

I worked then at the Institute of Instrument Engineering, that in Moscow on Kutuzovsky, there still near the entrance to the monument to the pilot-hero Valentine Grizodubova, who was driving there, probably paid attention to a granite woman with an airplane helmet. During the Soviet years, systems for on-board radar systems were developed there, after the collapse of the USSR, they basically switched to commercial orders, they had to eat something for something. And then the task was coming from the Ministry of Defense to create a kind of "black box", about the appointment of which, for obvious reasons, I will not tell. About the fact that in the process of setting up a few hours to sit in the technical compartment of the A-50 - it's not in the soft chair of the "Boeing" cognac to sip, I will not tell, the story is not about that. Colonels-generals from the ministry came to check the prototype of our product. One of the points of the act of acceptance-transfer is a test for the tightness of the shell. The case has a cunning form, but for simplicity of description let it be just a cube with an edge per meter. The test procedure for hermeticity is purely Soviet, no complex measuring instruments, the body with the help of a winch is drowned in a giant aquarium made of thick Plexiglas, the depth of three meters. If there are bubbles of air in the water - according to the test procedure, the product is rejected entirely, together with the electronics inside. Have seen in the movies of abandoned factories? The room with the aquarium looked about the same, and the aquarium was last washed, probably in Soviet times. The poured water became rusty-unclear. The winch, which pulls the tested product underwater for a long time, was stolen, probably handed over to scrap metal. They called the worker to drown the body with his hands. Let me remind you that this is not an air ball, it is a large hermetically sealed aluminum cube. The worker could not be drowned alone. We, simple engineers, refused to help the worker, our work is to invent schemes, not to play cubes. But the warriors took the initiative of the worker, three men in uniform with a bunch of stars rolled up their sleeves, climbed onto the ramp around the aquarium and shouted "one, two, three!" Began to push down the stubborn corps. It was almost possible for them to do this. At the last moment, the cube tumbled on its side, and all but the prudent worker could not resist and found themselves in the aquarium. Those who stood side by side, bounced away and shook the dirty water from their clothes, the "bulka" was not sickly. The aquarium started chaos, try to imagine what is happening: the warriors are trying to climb out, someone is constantly attacking someone, sending him down (and the depth is about three meters), then falls himself, and already attack him. The picture is supplemented by a floating metal cube floating around in a circle, for which they tried to grab, as for a life ring, and he kept turning over and beating another pop-up on various parts of the body. The phrase "b @ d, help the same" was the most censored, the rest of the cries of warriors and the words of the watchers will not lead. This lasted for half a minute, and maybe more, until the worker, who had fallen on the ramp, came out of the stupor and gave his hand to the drowning man. Dirty soldiers in a drenched form completely taken somewhere, probably, treated 40-degree sedative, and the "presentation" of the device on this ended. We smoked, discussed what had happened, and went on to work. Contrary to expectations, no one "flew in". And later it became known that our "black box" was admitted to armament, although a couple of tests after visiting the "free pool" by the host committee (we were joking) did not get the device. PS. Before the arrival of high officials, the product was, of course, preliminarily subjected to all checks, except for bathing in the notorious aquarium, this experienced specimen can still fly on one of the "Russian Avaks."

I happened to be somehow in the hospital with the most banal radiculitis. Years by the time I was about 25, a dude, a favorite of women and that's Don Juan. To make an accurate diagnosis, they decide to take a picture of the spinal column. And for this seemingly very simple procedure, it turns out that the enema is made beforehand so that all sorts of excesses in the intestine do not interfere with the entire set of my intervertebral hernias in the picture (alas, even in such young years this happens with the back). After taking a good roll of toilet paper, I come to where it says. Considerable size of the cabinet (whether procedural, or figs it knows-one of three). Mature aunt in a white coat. Get laid down, grit, my dear, here, on the couch, on the barrel. Lay down. Got a "dose." My aunt leaves. I look - in the corner of the room a toilet. Without any hints at any partitions and booths. He simply whitens himself lonely in a corner, invitingly beckons. And he put it on such a foundation, and if you climb on it, you will necessarily look like some proud mountain bird on the rock. And the process inside me is already going on with might and main. I jump to the door, I'm looking for something that does not look like a latch, the lock - no! I look out into the corridor, I estimate the distance to the known to me male institution. I understand with all my inner self that I will not make it there, and I jump to the white-tailed eagle on the white toilet bowl. As it later turned out, on that day the hospital was full of interns from a local medical school. The picture is not for the nerve: in the "red" corner of the room, on the very, it is possible to say, frontal place, the young eagle is sitting proudly, holding a roll of paper claws in claws. The process of preparing the spine for the photo session is in full swing and we will not stop it practically. Every minute the door to the room opens, a pretty head of an innocent creature appears in a white coat: "Is Mari-Ivanna here?" Oh! Another minute. Another no less handsome head: "And Mar-Ivanna ... Oh!" How many of the trainees were lucky enough to observe the proud bird sitting on that accursed faience ledge, now I do not remember. There were many of them. And one another is prettier. Only I was somehow not very happy ....

It was in the Army. I studied at the Irkutsk Military Aviation School together with my brother. We are twins. Not that they are exactly alike, but you can not figure it out with a run. Once during the exams, my brother thundered into the medical unit (put him). And how can he take the exam, if he is not released from the medical unit (army, yap her)? I refused to take the exam for both at once, but to lie down for a little while, until he passes the exam - why not? So, I passed the examination that day, ran to the medical unit, changed my clothes with the brother. And the thing is that I've never been in a medical unit and do not know where everything is. Well, there is nothing to be done, the brother explained to me: you will go up to the second floor, you will come to such and such a room, you will find such a bed in such and such a row - it's yours! I found this bed without any problems, lay down. I lie, I enjoy life. Well, I think I'll sleep after the exam. After about 5 minutes, the nurse comes in and says: "Mrs on the injection!" I was thrown from the bed, shouting: "What kind of shot? I'm healthy." She: "I do not know anything, I'm waiting in the Procedural". Well, I think everything, I'm stuck, specifically! For the brother I will now be spoiled. I think, what to do? And it occurred to me a crazy idea to sit tight in the toilet. I rested in the toilet for about 20 minutes. Well, I think it's time to go out. I creep out of the toilet with the thought of getting into the ward. I look, there is some madam in a dressing-gown. She saw me and said: "Oh, Mrs, well, take these tanks to the dining room." П-ец !!! How do I know where they have a canteen here? I took the tanks and the cellar along the corridor, hoping that I was going in the right direction. Madame jamb on me presses: type what is it he brakes? I walk along the corridor, mother to myself, and read the tablets on the door. On the last door I saw the inscription "Dining room". Well, thank God! Found! I threw these tanks and jumped into the room. And only I lay down, again this nurse: "Mrs, how much you can wait? But come on." And that's all! Still, I got my portion of penicillin in the ass for a bro. Then we laughed for a long time, especially I ..

This ridiculous story happened in the glorious, still Soviet army. They sent the cadets to clean the howitzer. The people are bustling about with a bath-house, everyone is running back and forth, a lot of water is sprayed with a special detergent, consisting of SEVEN alkalis! As this happened in our country, the cadets cleaned the gun without protective suits or even gloves. And then, one of them was impatient "for the little one." He went to piss, returned to the system. He feels, somehow he becomes uncomfortable, and most importantly, every minute the discomfort is stronger and stronger! Looked, baaaaa! The member swelled up, blushed and became four times more than usual! Since there was no one remotely familiar with the medicine at that time, the cadet just washed the damaged organ well, was wrapped in bandages (clumsily) and sent to the medical unit. The doctor was not there. In the waiting room sat only a young girl-paramedic. Throwing a stern look at the wounded soldier, the girl asked: "Well, what's the matter with the serviceman?" - Yes, here ... look ... A little shy, the guy points at his unbuttoned fly, from which the bandaged member of the Gordian knot stands. - Lord! What did you do to him !? (The nurse was genuinely surprised) - I cleaned the gun ... To finish the speech to the cadet have not given, from wild laughter of the girl-medical assistant and in time arrived in time the doctor, the work of the medical unit was simply paralyzed !.

I served in Germany. This here in Russia could have been both a layoff and wolves, and there, even if they let go, where to go? Everywhere the Germans! Once we went to the field exit. When they were in place, according to the word of mouth, they learned that not very far there is a lake where the beach of nudists was located, that in the mid-eighties there was something unimaginable for understanding, and one thought about it could be compared with the capacity of five kilotons of Viagra. - That's great! - I told Igor, and began to think about the plan of events. The next evening, due to the temporary absence of officers, we decided to use the chance. Of the number who previously showed courage to go, the three of us remained - Igor, Musa and I. The rest began to screw up the brain and otmazalis. In short, zassali. As real scouts, we agreed to be on the beach undetected, disguised as Germans. The lake was not big, and we decided to swim on the other side and go ashore, as if nothing had happened. And now, we are on the other side of the lake, we pull together the HB. There began to creep into doubts about the possibility of being unnoticed. Musa was all in portals like "GSVG", "I love as an angel," I laugh "like a demon", well, and other combinations of soldier's folklore. Nipples were everywhere, aggravated by dense black vegetation, starting from the top and to the heels. There was a feeling that there was a snowman in front of us. In short, he was not very much like a German. But being a man from the mountains, Musa had good eyesight and a hot temper. Apparently already having seen boobs in his natural binoculars, Musa immediately somehow tensed with his little brother. "No, I will not take off my panties," he said. Despite the fact that our secret journey will be revealed at the first glance at Musa, we nevertheless tried to persuade him to remove these blue, washed-out HB panties, which our army is famous for, which we could not without effort. Musa was all hoo. And here we are swimming in the middle of the lake like real Germans, the first bare fragments are already flickering, women's voices are already audible, we are already on the shore and are on the shore. Previously, with an effort of will, suppressing in oneself all natural instincts to which even cold water did not act, Igor and I went ashore, trying not to look around, and lay down on the sand, as if nothing had happened. Only after that we found out that Musa is waist-deep in water with a wide open mouth and broader eyes. The nearby Germans smiled. From the bushes of hair on Musa's breast a parachute with the Cyrillic alphabet peeped out, but Musa still believed that he looked like a German. We began to imperceptibly give signs, they say, let's go out. Musa somehow shook his head incomprehensibly and answered in a purely German language: "Nine!" After standing for about fifteen minutes as dead in the cold water, Musa drew the attention of half the beach, causing smiles and encouraging phrases in German, shimmering with red shades of embarrassment under the wool. It's time to save a friend, we thought. Entering the water and coming to him from behind, we began to carefully push him to the shore. Musa resisted, swearing for some reason in Russian, as a radio operator Kat during childbirth, revealing military secrets. Unable to withstand our pressure, Musa was at the very shore. Realizing that it was not easy for us to cope with it, he fell on his stomach. But just as the secrecy of our operation was already broken, laughing loudly and waving anything, we dragged Musa by the hands to the sand to the sonorous "I your mother" laughed "" and the applause of the spectators. Musa and lay all the time on his stomach, attracting to us local female representatives. As a result, we several times with Igor went to wolf in the nearest village to newly baked girlfriends, but already without Musa. Z. Y. Back in the water, Musa ran very quickly).

One pilot served in our regiment, he was famous for having sat down on a jet four times forced on a jet plane with a stalled engine. The fourth time was the most fun) And it was so. The airfield was on the Lena River. It took off normally, but at an altitude of 600 meters the engine stalled. I must say that the jet aircraft without a traction engine fly like a brick, thrown out of the window. So what to do? Below him is the city, and ahead of it directly at the rate - Lena, straight as an arrow, thick ice, winter in the yard, translates He is a plane in a dive and pushed to the river. We must add that he was flying to the test site, under the wings of the bomb, the missiles were hanging, in general, the kind of zashibis. In short, sits on the belly and slides on the ice, glides well - the speed of something go-go. Slipped two kilometers, stopped, opens the cockpit's lantern and sees that literally five yards away from him the man catches fish, wrapped himself up With his head in the sheepskin coat and, of course, hears nothing. Then our brave flyer unzips the oxygen mask and yells: "Hey, buddy, you took my hole!" The little mover turns and when he saw what the comrade was on the fishing trip he asked such a swinger that according to the pilot's words and afterburner it would not catch up. This is the story that happened in our glorious air force, When kerosene was in bulk ...

This is a real case that happened to me in the Caucasus Mountains in the spring of the 95th shaggy year. I then studied in Krasnodar at the journal of the Moscow Economic University (Kuban branch) and regularly visited the mountains with a backpack in the company of the same amateur (and self-ambitious) tourists. Outfit - at best a few meters of rope, sometimes an ice ax. On that expedition we conquered Mount Achishkho. Who does not know is in the vicinity of the upcoming Olympics. Then, almost twenty years ago - the places are pretty wild. The ascent we started on the second day, after spending the night on some half-dead camping site. The mountain, in principle, is not difficult. The climber does nothing there, if only to practice on the rocks. For the tourist it is. Slope, although steep, but you can climb without special equipment. The main difficulty at that time was in weather conditions. End of April - beginning of May. The slope, the mountain and the plateau are covered, well, with a very thick layer of snow. A lot of deep cracks, avalanche danger, of course. Plus, a strong wind with wet snow. In that campaign at zero, about the temperature, I froze my left hand. In the right there was an ice ax, she worked and was not injured. However, this is prehistory. At one "beautiful" moment, when the pass was a hundred meters to the pass, and the steepness of the slope went over 60 degrees (I can lie, but it was very cool), I decided that it would be easier to move to the left of the main group. Because they did not go in a bundle - it was decided - done. I understood my mistake in five meters. But it was too late to go down and I tried to go back to the previous course horizontally. Snowball underfoot is not too caked, rather wet and devilishly unreliable. In general, I slipped and rolled down no worse than a bobsledder. There was no fear, only the feeling that everything was not happening to me. In the beginning he tried to brake the ice ax. Then I picked up speed, I was thrown up and put my forehead against something hard. From the head flew off the cap "Afghan", but the worst - with this blow I was hit by glasses. With my "eagle eye" -7 - this is equivalent to almost complete blindness. And so, somersaulting, I flew two hundred meters. In itself came already at some site. I lay face down and nothing I do not need. The hardest part was getting myself to get to my feet. I got up, I just shook everything, I could not feel my hands, I do not feel my legs, but it seems like nothing hurts. Mind I understand that the hike is broken, without eyes, now I have only one way - to the valley with a good guide. Ten minutes later I see our commander Gennady Ognev coming down from the fog, (unfortunately he is no longer alive, he died in the mountains). "Aim?" - Alive like ... - Now ... Goes down a few meters down and comes back with my cap. "You'll catch cold on your head." With a stifling tongue, I ask if he has seen my glasses anywhere. Gennady laughs nervously and reasonably notes that I dug up the snow better than any tractor, and my cracked body cracks the cracks as well as the slalom. So, the archeologists will find the glasses in 25 thousand years. And here comes the incredible. The commander suddenly bends down and pulls out the POINT from beneath the sole of my left boot. THE WHOLE! "Well, the guy will live for a hundred years." I would never have believed in such luck, if it had not happened to me personally. ... And after half an hour, on the pass, Svetlana from our group fed us with a hand of chocolate, her own hands did not work. ... And the next night in the premises of an abandoned weather station in the vicinity of Achishkho, I saw a real ghost. .

Somehow celebrated the birthday of one girl. I and her several responsible partners came on time, but the rest of the guests were late. For obvious reasons, no one was waiting for them to late-the booze was in full swing. Those who appeared just wrote a penalty and took a friendly campaign. When about 30% of the guests gathered, everyone was already fairly on gas. The culprit of the celebration went to the toilet. A couple of minutes we hear - from the toilet are heard the cries of a drunk girl: - Open the door! We, as true gentlemen simply could not leave the lady in trouble and, under friendly hooting, carefully removed the door to the toilet from the hinges. The first thing we heard from a girl sitting on a push in the pose of a proud eagle was the words: - DOLBOBS! INLET DOOR OPEN ....

It was during the second company in the Chechen Republic (Chechen Republic). A group of heroes safely completed a business trip and got to Mazdok without any losses (who knows, he understands what they mean) was waiting for the board in the camp on the territory of the airfield. At that time, in the area of ??the Mozdok airfield there was a transshipment base, a large tent village (or a small tent city, as you like) with streets, lanes, headquarters (city hall), canteen, etc., etc. Attributes. To the heroes, two tents (dozens) are set aside at the edge of the village, but all fell into one (the collective is edenat), well, and having bought the last travel medicine for stress in the local pharmacy (boiler room) went to nirvana (and the board was to arrive the next morning) . Among the heroes was a cynologist Minorozychnoy specialization with a dog (spaniel bitch) nicknamed Katya. Waking up in the area (shorter than daylight), he did not find a dog that slept in the legs at night. Deciding that Katya had left for dog business and found a need for herself, only a human being, the cynologist left the tent and did not find his partner within sight, began to call out quietly at first, not to wake the camp, and then louder - Katya, Katya where you are. With this appeal began to bypass all the nearest streets and lanes of the camp, the dogs where not nebylo. And then he was visited by a terrible thought (reinforced with not completely evaporated pairs of anti-stress medication) - The dog was lost !!! Board in a couple of hours, it can not be canceled, in general, a complete PI! With these thoughts and groans already in full voice - Katya, Katenka where you are my girl, went to the main street (where the headquarters, dining room, etc.) which was already coming out to the launch. Then a girl's head protrudes from one of the tents and says it playfully: "I'm here, and at the same time Katya appears from the next tent, expressing herself guilty for what she did (evidently she went to the smells of eating). At the cynologist, a man's tearful tear stitches away, he does not restrain from the soul, but the soul demands retribution and the soul gives out to the whole camp - Oh, you're a bitch, oh, you're a prostitute, on someone else's tent sharisya. A second later, the camp is covered with wild cackling. It turns out (well, it coincided), l / s celebrated the birthday of the local serviceman Katerina, which lasted until the morning and no one imagined that a namesake would temporarily appear in the camp and with her would happen such an unpleasant story, which was later recalled for a long time.
I heard that some stalkers served in hot spots. Do you know anything about the Afghan and Chechen wars? May be stories of eyewitnesses?
Thank you.

One friend recently told a story. Now I'll tell you. The intelligence department of the 5th Khad Office managed to introduce its agent to the dushmans. In Pakistan, he was rebuffed and sent back to Kabul with the task to blow up the school, gave out two kilograms of plastic, a piece of a fire-cord about a meter in length and two detonator caps. He brought all this to Khad and reported on the assignment received. The KGB advisors asked me to conduct an examination and give a conclusion: is this really an explosive? I pinched off a piece of plastic and held a lit match. The people shied in different directions. The plastic flared with a bright flame. The fire-proof cord also caught fire as expected. Everything is fine, the quality is excellent. To test the detonators, one of them will have to be tested. However, the advisers did not want too much noise in the arrangement. Thinking what to do next. You can not blow up a school and do not perform a test task to an agent. The school was located in the airport area and was a two-storey wooden structure, similar to a barn. I put my eye on the "imported" explosives and offered to advisers: - Guys, give it to me. Imported explosives are needed for foreign shares. In return, I will make you a bomb from Soviet plastic. The explosion will be all right: in the whole district, glasses will fly out, and the school will not suffer. The senior adviser narrowed his eyes cunningly. - And maybe you decided to decorate it as your trophy? - Ugh! - I was offended and left.
